summary: Adds metadata filtering to listMessages for PG and in-memory storage backends. Allows filtering messages by metadata key-value pairs using JSONB containment (@>) in PG. Includes 6 shared tests, docs updates for recall/client-js/message-history, changeset, input validation, and API filter schema update. Only covers PG and in-memory backends (not LibSQL or other stores).
maintainerNotes: This PR is almost certainly superseded by #14040 (opened 2026-03-09 by DanielSLew), which implements the same feature (metadata filtering for listMessages, same issue #12260) but with broader coverage across all storage backends (PG, LibSQL, in-memory) and 1070 additions. PR #14034 (merged 2026-03-09) also added btree indexes on metadata fields to support this feature. This PR has merge conflicts (CONFLICTING state) and CI checks are stuck in PENDING since 2026-02-25. The contributor did solid work with good tests, docs, and validation, but a maintainer has taken over the implementation with a more comprehensive approach. Recommend closing with a thank-you to the contributor for the groundwork.
